name: @lumorix/game-template
description: Template for creating Lumorix launcher-compatible games

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:zip
scripts.package:zip: powershell -Command "& { $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $buildDir = 'dist'; if (Test-Path 'game.zip') { Remove-Item 'game.zip' }; Compress-Archive -Path $buildDir\* -DestinationPath 'game.zip'; (Get-FileHash 'game.zip' -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.ToLower() | Out-File 'game.zip.sha256'; Write-Host \"✓ Packaged game.zip\"; Write-Host \"✓ SHA256: \" -NoNewline; Get-Content 'game.zip.sha256'; }"
